body:
no_changes
rationale: Bead: B22d-h — delete RunViaService + RunViaServiceWith + runFixtureHarnessViaRunner

STATUS: Cannot be completed in this pass. The bead's premise is false: it claims
"After steps b, c, d all migrated their callers, this deletion is mechanical."
That is incorrect — steps a, e, f, and g (which migrate the remaining callers)
are NOT yet closed.

(a) WHAT IS DONE
Nothing. No code changes were made. Verification only.

(b) WHAT IS BLOCKING

`ddx bead list | grep B22d` shows the current decomposition state:

  ddx-636ca6d4  closed        B22d-b
  ddx-06267d44  closed        B22d-c
  ddx-c168f77f  closed        B22d-d
  ddx-a4c8ed23  in_progress   B22d-a (grade.go r.Run -> r.runInternal)
  ddx-7c6664be  in_progress   B22d-e (BuildArgs signature off RunOptions)
  ddx-9f4b1a8c  open          B22d-f (SessionIndexEntryFromResult off RunOptions)
  ddx-ce7a796e  open          B22d-g (RunFunc + runCompareArmWith + public
                                       Run*With signatures off RunOptions)
  ddx-b602ccce  in_progress   B22d-h (this bead)

`grep -rn "RunViaService\|RunViaServiceWith\|runFixtureHarnessViaRunner"
cli/internal/agent cli/cmd` shows live, non-test callers that still depend on
the three functions this bead asks me to delete:

  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:214  RunCompareViaService -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:223  RunCompareWithAgent  -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:435  RunQuorumWithConfigViaService -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:481  RunQuorumViaService  -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:489  RunQuorumWithAgent   -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/dispatch.go:79          dispatchViaResolvedConfig -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go:112  RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/session_index_test.go:283            RunViaServiceWith

The compare_adapter.go callers are owned by step B22d-g ("RunFunc +
runCompareArmWith + public Run*With signatures off RunOptions"). The two test
files are part of the broader RunOptions retirement (steps e/f/g). Step c's
own commit message (96b243d1) confirms this scope split: "step g/h covers
RunOptions retirement", which means g must run before h is mechanical.

The dispatch.go call site at line 79 (introduced in B22d-d) was deliberately
left calling RunViaServiceWith because RunWithConfigViaService delegates back
through RunViaService — there is no in-package internal helper today that
takes (svc, projectRoot, opts). Inlining the three functions into
RunWithConfigViaService alone (a public ResolvedConfig+runtime function) does
not give dispatch.go a substitute either, because dispatch.go already has
override-resolved opts and would have to build a synthetic ResolvedConfig.

If I tried to satisfy this bead in isolation today I would have to either:
  1. Delete the three functions and watch `go build ./...` fail on at least
     8 call sites — violating "do not commit red code".
  2. Migrate compare_adapter.go (step g), dispatch.go, and the two test files
     myself — silently absorbing scope from B22d-a, -e, -f, -g, which the
     decomposition deliberately separated.
  3. Convert the three deletions into shims (re-export under new names) —
     which contradicts the AC ("removed from cli/internal/agent/service_run.go").

(c) WHAT A FOLLOW-UP ATTEMPT NEEDS

Close (or merge into this bead) B22d-a, B22d-e, B22d-f, and especially
B22d-g first. Once B22d-g lands, compare_adapter.go's Run*ViaService and
Run*WithAgent helpers will no longer call RunViaService/RunViaServiceWith,
and the two test files will have been converted off raw RunOptions. At that
point the only remaining caller will be dispatch.go:79, and the deletion
truly is mechanical: rename RunViaServiceWith to a lowercase
runViaServiceWith (or fold it into dispatchViaResolvedConfig), then delete
RunViaService and runFixtureHarnessViaRunner.

Re-queue this bead after B22d-a/e/f/g close. A stronger model is not the
issue — sequencing is.

no_changes
rationale: Bead: B22d-h — delete RunViaService + RunViaServiceWith + runFixtureHarnessViaRunner

STATUS: Cannot be completed in this pass. Same blocker as the previous attempt:
the bead's premise — "After steps b, c, d all migrated their callers, this
deletion is mechanical" — is still false. Steps B22d-f and B22d-g, which own
the remaining live callers and the RunOptions retirement, are NOT yet closed.

(a) WHAT IS DONE
Nothing. No code changes. Verification only.

(b) WHAT IS BLOCKING

Current B22d decomposition state (`ddx bead list | grep B22d`):

  ddx-a4c8ed23  closed         B22d-a
  ddx-636ca6d4  closed         B22d-b
  ddx-06267d44  closed         B22d-c
  ddx-c168f77f  closed         B22d-d
  ddx-7c6664be  closed         B22d-e
  ddx-9f4b1a8c  in_progress    B22d-f (SessionIndexEntryFromResult off RunOptions)
  ddx-ce7a796e  open           B22d-g (RunFunc + runCompareArmWith + public
                                       Run*With signatures off RunOptions)
  ddx-b602ccce  in_progress    B22d-h (this bead)

`grep -rn "RunViaService\|RunViaServiceWith\|runFixtureHarnessViaRunner"
cli/internal/agent cli/cmd` shows live, non-test callers that still depend on
the three functions this bead asks to delete:

  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:214  RunCompareViaService -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:223  RunCompareWithAgent  -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:435  RunQuorumWithConfigViaService -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:481  RunQuorumViaService  -> RunViaService
  - cli/internal/agent/compare_adapter.go:489  RunQuorumWithAgent   -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/dispatch.go:79          dispatchViaResolvedConfig -> RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go:112  RunViaServiceWith
  - cli/internal/agent/session_index_test.go:283            RunViaServiceWith

The compare_adapter.go callers are owned by step B22d-g. The dispatch.go call
site is internal plumbing that has no in-package replacement until B22d-g
introduces a Run*With signature that does not take RunOptions, or until a new
internal helper is introduced as part of g/h. The two test files are part of
the broader RunOptions retirement.

Inlining the three functions into RunWithConfigViaService alone (a public
ResolvedConfig+runtime function) does not give compare_adapter.go or
dispatch.go a substitute, because those callers do not have a ResolvedConfig
on hand — they hold override-resolved RunOptions assembled from per-arm
overrides (compare/quorum) or from runtime+overrides (dispatch).

The AC also requires `cd cli && go test ./...` to pass, which is impossible
while session_index_test.go and prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go still call
RunViaServiceWith. Those test sites are owned by step B22d-f/g (test
migration is explicitly out of scope here).

(c) WHAT A FOLLOW-UP ATTEMPT WOULD NEED

Either:

  1. Close B22d-f and B22d-g first (the proper sequencing the bead description
     itself implies). Once compare_adapter.go and the two oversize/session
     tests are migrated off RunOptions, this bead becomes a mechanical delete
     of three functions plus a single inlining into RunWithConfigViaService.

  2. Or, expand this bead's scope to include the work currently scoped to
     B22d-f and B22d-g — i.e., introduce a service-level internal helper that
     dispatch.go and compare_adapter.go can call without RunOptions, migrate
     all five compare/quorum sites and dispatchViaResolvedConfig onto it,
     migrate the two test sites, and only then delete the three functions.
     This is the "expand scope" path called out in the SD-024 tracker note
     (97561a6e: "atomic cross-caller migration"); it is well beyond the
     "mechanical deletion" scope described in this bead's own description.

The previous attempt at this bead reached the same conclusion. Re-queueing
without first closing B22d-f and B22d-g will reproduce the same blocker.

no_changes
rationale: Bead ddx-b602ccce (B22d-h) is already satisfied at base-rev 63a21796.

Status:
- RunViaService, RunViaServiceWith, and runFixtureHarnessViaRunner have already been
  deleted from cli/internal/agent/service_run.go.
- The `field RunOptions` struct/field is no longer present in service_run.go (grep for
  "RunOptions" in that file returns no matches).
- The retirement was performed in commit 35eeebdd:
    refactor(agent): retire RunViaService/RunViaServiceWith/runFixtureHarnessViaRunner [ddx-b602ccce]
  which is an ancestor of base-rev 63a21796 (verified with
  `git merge-base --is-ancestor 35eeebdd 63a21796`).

Acceptance criteria check at base-rev:
- "field RunOptions removed from cli/internal/agent/service_run.go" — yes, no matches.
- "cd cli && go build ./... passes" — yes, clean build, no output.
- "cd cli && go test ./... passes" — package-level tests pass for the agent package
  except a pre-existing TestIntegration_CodexEcho integration test that fails due to
  an external codex CLI rollout-recording warning unrelated to this refactor.
  This is not caused by this bead and not in scope.

Remaining stale references are in comments/docstrings only (script_test.go,
agent_run_config_test.go, session_index_test.go, compare_adapter.go,
service_run.go header comment) and do not affect AC. The previous review's
REVIEW:BLOCK was raised against an earlier attempt where the diff only contained
execution evidence; the actual refactor commit 35eeebdd was already merged into
the base. No further code changes are required for this bead.

Recommendation: close as already-satisfied.
